name: HORACE MANN EDUCATORS CORP /DE/
summary: Horace Mann Educators Corporation (HMEC) is an insurance holding company founded in 1945, focused on providing financial services and insurance products to K-12 educators and school districts. Products include auto insurance, homeowners insurance, life insurance, 403(b) retirement annuities, supplemental health insurance, and group benefits (disability, life). Operating through three segments—Property & Casualty, Life & Retirement, and Supplemental & Group Benefits—it serves approximately 14 million educator households across the U.S. via exclusive agents, brokers, and digital channels.

products.name: Auto Insurance
products.description: Personal automobile insurance tailored for educators.

products.name: Homeowners Insurance
products.description: Property and homeowners insurance for educators, offered since 1965.

products.name: 403(b) Retirement Annuities
products.description: Tax-qualified retirement annuity plans for educators, offered since 1961.

products.name: Life Insurance
products.description: Individual and group life insurance products for educators.

products.name: Supplemental Health Insurance
products.description: Individual supplemental health coverage including accident, hospital, cancer, and critical illness.

products.name: Group Benefits
products.description: Employer-sponsored disability, life, and supplemental health benefits for school districts.

products.name: Mutual Funds
products.description: Investment fund options available to educator clients.

products.name: Student Loan Solutions
products.description: Student loan management solutions offered to educators.

products.name: Credit Monitoring
products.description: Credit monitoring services available to educator customers.

products.name: Financial Wellness Workshops
products.description: Educational financial wellness programs offered to educators.

products.name: Workday Financials

partnerships.description: Long-standing relationships with education professional associations for marketing and distribution.
Partnerships supporting brand trust and market access within the education community.
